question: Which greeting text is displayed on the black background at the beginning of the video? A. Thanks for joining me today! B. HERSHEY'S MILK CHOCOLATE C. Welcome to Melissa's Crafting Treehouse D. Happy Crafting!!!
What year is printed on the chocolate bar wrapper visible on the table?
What is the primary color of the snowman crafts' bodies? A. Green B. Red C. White D. Blue
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Six snowman crafts are arranged in a row on a light-colored wooden surface with horizontal grain. Each figure has a white paper body displaying a drawn face and black dot buttons. Colorful fleece hats in green, blue, brown, and red top the cylinders. Green and brown fleece scarves wrap around the necks of the white paper forms.

question: How many hands are visible?

Did the video feature BOTH the intro text 'Welcome to Melissa's Crafting Treehouse' AND snowman-themed gift boxes? A. Only the intro text appeared B. Only the gift boxes appeared C. Both the intro text and gift boxes appeared D. Neither appeared
Where are the snowman crafts located in chunks 2 through 7? A. away from the wooden surface B. towards the center C. in a row on a wooden surface D. to the left of the hands
Where is the green object moved towards in chunk 11? A. in a row on a wooden surface B. towards the center C. away from the wooden surface D. on the wooden surface
What action are the hands performing on the green felt cutout?
Describe the sequence of events shown in the video, noting when the text appears, when the crafts are shown, and when hands interact with them.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white text reading 'Welcome to Melissa's Crafting Treehouse' appears on a black background; at 4s, six snowman crafts with colorful fleece hats are displayed on a wooden surface; at 16s, a pair of hands enters the frame to hold the snowman crafts; at 18s, the hands lift the bundle of decorations away from the table.

question: Has the sewing of the green felt bundle with a needle and thread started yet?

From snowman crafts to felt pieces and a glue gun C. From felt pieces and a glue gun to snowman crafts D. From snowman crafts to snowman crafts with different colored hats

Hands manipulate a green rectangular object C. Hands position a chocolate bar next to a paper cutout D. Hands reach for and grasp the black hot glue gun
